description_long: This is a modern tactical rifle with a matte black finish, featuring a robust polymer stock and a metal receiver. The rifle has a detachable box magazine located just in front of the trigger guard, and a prominent pistol grip for ergonomic handling. Along the top, a full-length Picatinny rail is present, supporting iron sights for aiming. The barrel is of standard length and is fitted with a flash hider at the muzzle. The fore-end is ribbed for improved grip, and the overall design is streamlined for urban tactical use. The stock is fixed and solid, providing stability during firing.
description: A modern black tactical rifle with a fixed stock, detachable magazine, iron sights, and a flash hider on a standard barrel.
description_view_0: Side profile showing the full length, fixed stock, pistol grip, detachable magazine, and flash hider.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the barrel, flash hider, and narrow profile of the fore-end.
description_view_2: Opposite side profile, again showing the fixed stock, magazine, and overall streamlined design.
description_view_3: Rear view focusing on the stock and the alignment of the receiver and barrel.
